goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Run the Flask app, test every API endpoint and UI feature end-to-end, and fix all remaining bugs in app.py, app.js, style.css, and index.html in a single pass

children.description: Start Flask app, verify GET / serves index.html and all static assets load (CSS, JS) without 404s
Test /api/tree returns valid JSON tree and /api/doc?path=<valid> returns HTML+backlinks+raw; fix any issues
Test POST /api/doc saves content and rebuilds index; test POST /api/rebuild
Test /api/tags, /api/tags/<name>, and /api/search?q=test return correct results; fix any issues
Fix CSS selector mismatches: #btn-save -> #editor-save, .result-title -> .search-result-title, hardcoded colors -> CSS vars
Verify tree renders on page load, clicking a file calls loadDoc, active item highlights; fix any JS issues
Verify tag cloud renders and filters tree; verify search input triggers debounced fetch and results appear; fix issues
Verify editor toggle/save/cancel work; wiki-links navigate correctly; backlinks panel populates on doc load
Verify hamburger menu appears at narrow viewport and toggles sidebar overlay; no JS console errors on any interaction

tree.description: Commit all changes and push to origin
